plugin.name: Pot_miniwindow
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Keeps track of available potions within a miniwindow.

muclient.triggers:
<trigger enabled="y" match="^You (quaff|eat|recite) (?.*?)\.$" regexp="y" sequence="100" send_to="12" script="updatePots" >
<trigger enabled="y" match="^You (?buy) (?.*?) from (.*?)\.$" regexp="y" sequence="100" send_to="12" script="batchUpdatePots" >
<trigger enabled="y" regexp="y" match="^You (?sell) (?.*?) to .* for .* gold\.$" sequence="100" send_to="12" script="batchUpdatePots">
<trigger enabled="y" regexp="y" match="^You (?drop|get) (?.*?)\.$" sequence="100" send_to="12" script="batchUpdatePots">
EnableTrigger("startcaptureinv", false)
if refresh then EnableTrigger("refreshinv", true) else inventory = {} EnableTrigger("captureinv", true) end
EnableTrigger("endcaptureinv", true)
EnableTrigger("endcaptureinv", false)
if refresh then EnableTrigger("refreshinv", false) refresh = false reupScanDone = true if not reupQuiet then ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("All pots refreshed.", 60)) end else EnableTrigger("captureinv", false) finalizeCapture() end
redraw()
<trigger name="captureinv" match="^(?[\d]+)\,(?.*)\,(?.+)\,(?[\d]+)\,(?[\d]+)\,[\d]+\,-1,(?:-1|[\d]+)$" enabled="n" regexp="y" omit_from_output="y" send_to="12" script="registerPot">
<trigger name="refreshinv" match="^(?[\d]+)\,(?.*)\,(?.+)\,(?[\d]+)\,(?[\d]+)\,[\d]+\,-1,(?:-1|[\d]+)$" enabled="n" regexp="y" omit_from_output="y" send_to="12" script="refreshPots">
for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do v.amount = 0 end for i, v in pairs(vars.reup or {}) do v.amount = 0 end
refresh = true EnableTrigger("startcaptureinv", true) SendNoEcho("invdata " .. vars.potbag .. " ansi")
muclient.aliases:
<alias match="^potmon (?.*?)$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="105">
registeredPot = "%1" EnableTrigger("startcaptureinv", true) SendNoEcho("invdata ansi")
for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do v.amount = 0 end for i, v in pairs(vars.reup or {}) do v.amount = 0 end
refresh = true EnableTrigger("startcaptureinv", true) SendNoEcho("invdata " .. vars.potbag .. " ansi")
<alias match="^potmon bag(?[\d\s]+)?$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="95">
if string.find(Trim("%1"), " ") then ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("Bag id contained spaces. [Invalid ID]", 60)) else vars.potbag = "%1" or "" ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("Bag id set to : " .. (vars.potbag == "" and "inventory" or vars.potbag), 60)) end
<alias enabled="y" match="^potmon([\s]*)low (?[\d]*)$" regexp="y" sequence="95" send_to="12" script="setlow" >
<alias match="^potmon([\s]*)remove (?.*)$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="95" script="removePot">
vars.minimize = not vars.minimize redraw()
closeToggle()
vars.pos_x = 495 vars.pos_y = 322
WindowPosition(win, vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y, miniwin.pos_stretch_to_view, miniwin.create_absolute_location)
<alias match="^potreup add (?\S+) (?\d+) (?.+)$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="90" script="potreupAdd"> <alias match="^potreup target (?\S+) (?\d+)$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="90" script="potreupTarget"> <alias match="^potreup room (?\S+)$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="90" script="potreupSetRoom"> <alias match="^potreup remove (?\S+)$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="90" script="potreupRemove"> <alias match="^potmon display( (?.*))?$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="90" script="potmonDisplay"> <alias match="^potmon colou?r (?.+) (?\S+)$" regexp="y" enabled="y" echo_alias="n" send_to="12" sequence="90" script="potmonColor">
muclient.script:
require "serialize" require "wait"
-- Enables @x / @W Aardwolf colour codes in cnote() output (used by the help screen) dofile(GetInfo(60) .. "aardwolf_colors.lua") function cnote(s) AnsiNote(stylesToANSI(ColoursToStyles(s))) end
-- Default variables win = "Pot_miniwin_" .. GetPluginID() icon = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) .. "Masaki2.png" vars = {}
-- Saved variables vars.defaultFont = "defaultFont" vars.defaultFontFamily = "Consolas" vars.header = {} vars.fontSize = 8 vars.fontHeight = 8 vars.winLeft = 0 vars.winTop = 0 vars.winRight = 200 vars.winBottom = 200 vars.winHeight = 1 vars.potlist = {} vars.pos_x = 495 vars.pos_y = 322 vars.potlow = 10 vars.show = true vars.minimize = false vars.snapSize = 10 vars.textBackground = "black" vars.textForeground = "turquoise" vars.potbag = ""
-- Activity variables inventory = {} identifier = nil registeredPot = "" refresh = false dragSpot = nil splitter = "#&&" currentRoom = nil -- last room number seen via GMCP (for potreup arrival detection) reupRunning = false -- guards against starting potreup twice reupQuiet = false -- suppresses the "All pots refreshed" note during a reup bag scan reupScanDone = false -- set true by endcaptureinv when an invdata scan completes
function OnPluginInstall() -- Restore saved states assert(loadstring(GetVariable("vars") or ""))() vars = vars or {} vars.reup = vars.reup or {} -- list of reup pots {keyword, target, name, room, amount} vars.potcolors = vars.potcolors or {} -- per-potion display colour, keyed by potion name vars.shown = vars.shown or {} -- which potion names show in the window (max 2); empty = show all
-- Refresh all states if changes or updates were added if vars.show == nil or vars.minimize == nil or vars.defaultFontFamily ~= "Consolas" or vars.snapSize == nil or vars.potbag == nil then
vars.defaultFont = vars.defaultFont or "defaultFont" vars.defaultFontFamily = vars.defaultFontFamily or "Consolas" vars.header = {} vars.fontSize = vars.fontSize or 8 vars.fontHeight = vars.fontHeight or 8 vars.winLeft = vars.winLeft or 0 vars.winTop = vars.winTop or 0 vars.winRight = vars.winRight or 200 vars.winBottom = vars.winBottom or 200 vars.winHeight = vars.winHeight or 1 vars.pos_x = vars.pos_x or 495 vars.pos_y = vars.pos_y or 322 vars.show = vars.show or true vars.minimize = vars.minimize or false vars.snapSize = vars.snapSize or 10 vars.potlist = vars.potlist or {} vars.potbag = vars.potbag or "" end
-- Prepare miniwin header if #vars.header == 0 then vars.header = {} table.insert(vars.header, {text = "--- ", textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("teal")}) table.insert(vars.header, {text = "Potion Monitor", textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("turquoise")}) table.insert(vars.header, {text = " --- ", textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("teal")}) end
-- Load miniwin and its properties WindowCreate(win, vars.winLeft, vars.winTop, vars.winRight, vars.winBottom, miniwin.pos_center_all, miniwin.create_keep_hotspots, ColourNameToRGB("black")) WindowFont(win, vars.defaultFont, vars.defaultFontFamily, vars.fontSize, false, false, false, false, 1, 0) WindowLoadImage(win, "icon", icon)
-- Draw basic miniwin vars.fontHeight = WindowFontInfo(win, vars.defaultFont, 1)
local max_width = 0 for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do max_width = math.max(max_width, textWidth("[ ] " .. v.name .. "(" .. tostring(v.level) .. ") ") or 0) end vars.winRight = math.max(max_width, textWidth(vars.header[1].text .. vars.header[2].text .. vars.header[3].text) + 25)
vars.winBottom = vars.winHeight * vars.fontHeight
resize() WindowSetZOrder(win, 500) drawDefaults(true) WindowShow(win, vars.show) WindowPosition(win, vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y, miniwin.pos_stretch_to_view, miniwin.create_absolute_location)
-- Final touches to the loading sequence redraw() showHelp() end
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("vars", serialize.save("vars")) end
function showHelp() cnote("@x099+--------------------- @WPotion Monitor @x099---------------------+@w") cnote("") cnote("@x045Monitor@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon <name>@x045 add a pot/pill/scroll (any part of the name)@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon remove <pot>@x045 remove one@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon clear@x045 empty the list @x099(also: clear potmon)@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon refresh@x045 recount all pots from your bag@w") cnote(" @Wpotmonlow <#>@x045 low-amount warning threshold@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon bag <id>@x045 which bag pots are in (blank = inventory)@w") cnote("") cnote("@x045Display@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon display <a> <b>@x045 show only these 1-2 pots @x099(@Wall@x099 = show every)@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon color <pot> <c>@x045 set a name colour @x099(@Wdefault@x099 to clear)@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon list@x045 list all monitored pots, colour, shown@w") cnote("") cnote("@x045Reup @x099(buy up to a target at recorded shops)@w") cnote(" @Wpotreup add <kw> <#> <name>@x045 buy <kw>, top to <#>, count <name>@w") cnote(" @Wpotreup@x045 travel to each shop and buy your deficits@w") cnote(" @Wpotreup list@x045 show reup pots: have/target, room@w") cnote(" @Wpotreup target <kw> <#>@x045 change a target@w") cnote(" @Wpotreup room <kw>@x045 record current room as that pot's shop@w") cnote(" @Wpotreup remove <kw>@x045 remove a reup pot@w") cnote("") cnote("@x045Window@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon minimize@x045 minimize / restore@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon show@x045 show / hide@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon return@x045 move back to default location@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon setfont@x045 change font size@w") cnote(" @Wpotmon help@x045 this screen@w") cnote("@x099+-----------------------------------------------------------+@w") end
--[[ ================================================================== = MINIWIN UTILITIES = ================================================================== ]]
function dragmove(flags, hotspot_id) local previousX, previousY = vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y
if not dragSpot then vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y = WindowInfo (win, 17) - WindowInfo(win, 14), WindowInfo (win, 18) - 5 dragSpot = WindowInfo(win, 14) else vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y = WindowInfo (win, 17) - dragSpot, WindowInfo (win, 18) - 5 end
local changedX, changedY = vars.pos_x - previousX, vars.pos_y - previousY snap(win, changedX, changedY, vars)
WindowPosition(win, vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y, miniwin.pos_stretch_to_view, miniwin.create_absolute_location) end
function dragrelease(flags, hotspot_id) dragSpot = nil end
function showWindow(show) -- Utility function, shows or hides the miniwin.
WindowShow(win, show) end
function redraw() -- Utility function, redraws the miniwin.
calculateWidthHeight() resize() drawDefaults(true) showWindow(vars.show) end
function getShownKeys() -- Returns the ordered list of potion names to display in the window. -- If the user picked specific ones (max 2), show those; otherwise show all. if vars.shown and #vars.shown > 0 then local keys = {} for _, k in ipairs(vars.shown) do if vars.potlist[k] then table.insert(keys, k) end end return keys end local keys = {} for k in pairs(vars.potlist) do table.insert(keys, k) end return keys end
function findPotKey(sub) -- Resolve a name substring to a monitored potion's key (its full name). for k, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do if v.name and string.find(string.lower(v.name), string.lower(sub), 1, true) then return k end end return nil end
function potmonDisplay(name, line, wildcards) -- Choose which monitored potions show in the window (up to 2). "all" shows all. local arg = (wildcards.which or ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1") if arg == "" or string.lower(arg) == "all" then vars.shown = {} redraw() ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("Showing all monitored potions.", 60)) return end
local parts = split(arg) local picked = {} for _, p in ipairs(parts) do local k = findPotKey(p) if k then local dup = false for _, e in ipairs(picked) do if e == k then dup = true break end end if not dup then table.insert(picked, k) end else ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("No monitored pot matches '" .. p .. "'.", 60)) end if #picked >= 2 then break end end
if #picked == 0 then return end vars.shown = picked redraw() ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("Now showing: " .. table.concat(picked, ", "), 60)) end
function potmonColor(name, line, wildcards) -- Assign a display colour to a monitored potion's name. local k = findPotKey(wildcards.pot) if not k then ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("No monitored pot matches '" .. wildcards.pot .. "'.", 60)) return end local colour = (wildcards.colour or ""):gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1") if colour == "" or string.lower(colour) == "default" or string.lower(colour) == "none" then vars.potcolors[k] = nil redraw() ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText(k .. " colour reset to default.", 60)) return end if ColourNameToRGB(colour) == -1 then ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("'" .. colour .. "' is not a valid colour name.", 60)) return end vars.potcolors[k] = colour redraw() ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText(k .. " colour set to " .. colour .. ".", 60)) end
function tellPotName(v) -- Echo a potion's name to the output window using its captured inventory colours, -- so the list looks like the miniwindow. Falls back to the default colour. if not (v.styles and v.line and v.startind and v.endind) then ColourTell(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, tostring(v.name)) return end local nameFrom, nameTo = v.startind + 1, v.endind - 1 local pos = 0 for _, st in ipairs(v.styles) do local t = st.text or "" local len = #t local from = math.max(pos + 1, nameFrom) local to = math.min(pos + len, nameTo) if from <= to then local sub = t:sub(from - pos, to - pos) local fg = st.textcolour and RGBColourToName(st.textcolour) or vars.textForeground ColourTell(fg, vars.textBackground, sub) end pos = pos + len end end
function potmonListAll(name, line, wildcards) -- List every monitored potion, showing the name in its own colour (or a custom one). local any = false ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, "+------------------ Monitored Potions ------------------+") local shownset = {} for _, k in ipairs(vars.shown or {}) do shownset[k] = true end for k, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do any = true local mark = shownset[k] and "*" or " " ColourTell(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, string.format(" %s [%3d] ", mark, tonumber(v.amount) or 0)) local custom = vars.potcolors[k] if custom and ColourNameToRGB(custom) ~= -1 then ColourTell(custom, vars.textBackground, tostring(v.name)) else tellPotName(v) end ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, "") end if not any then ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("No potions monitored yet.", 60)) end ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, "+ * = shown in window ------------------------------+") end
function resize() -- Utility function, resizes the miniwin.
if not vars.minimize then WindowResize(win, vars.winRight, vars.winHeight * vars.fontHeight, ColourNameToRGB("black")) else WindowResize(win, vars.winRight, vars.fontHeight, ColourNameToRGB("black")) end end
function textWidth(text) -- Utility function, returns the total width the given text requires within the miniwin.
return WindowTextWidth(win, vars.defaultFont, text) end
function drawDefaults(refreshHotspots) -- Utility function, draws the default layout of the miniwin.
-- Clear miniwin WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("black"))
-- Miniwin background and outline WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, vars.winRight, vars.fontHeight, ColourNameToRGB("black")) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_3d_rect, 0, 0, vars.winRight, 0, ColourNameToRGB("teal"), ColourNameToRGB("turquoise"))
-- Seperator for header WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_3d_rect, 0, 0, vars.winRight, vars.fontHeight, ColourNameToRGB("teal"), ColourNameToRGB("turquoise"))
drawText("", 0, 25, vars.header)
if refreshHotspots then WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win)
-- Drag hotspot for header WindowAddHotspot(win, "DragArea", vars.fontHeight, 0, vars.winRight, vars.fontHeight, "", "", "", "", "", vars.headerhint, miniwin.cursor_both_arrow, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "DragArea", "dragmove", "dragrelease", 0) end
-- Minimize and close button WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 5, 4, vars.fontSize * 1.42, vars.fontSize * 1.16, ColourNameToRGB("black")) WindowTransformImage(win, "icon", 5 + (vars.minimize and 2 + ((vars.fontSize - 6) * 1.5) or 0), 4 + (vars.minimize and 2 + ((vars.fontSize - 6)) or 0), miniwin.image_copy, ((vars.fontSize * 1.42 - 5) / 50) * (vars.minimize and -1 or 1), 0, 0, ((vars.fontSize * 1.16 - 4) / 50) * (vars.minimize and -1 or 1)) if refreshHotspots then WindowAddHotspot(win, "ToggleArea", 5, 4, vars.fontSize * 1.42, vars.fontSize * 1.16, "", "", "", "", "toggleMiniwin", "{-=Left click to minimize : Right click to close=-}", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end
-- Draw potion list local index = 0
for _, potKey in ipairs(getShownKeys()) do local v = vars.potlist[potKey] if v then local styles = {}
styles = v.styles
local custom = vars.potcolors and vars.potcolors[v.name] local nameStart = textWidth(string.rep(" ", 8)) local adjustedX = 1 - textWidth(v.line:sub(1, v.startind)) + nameStart if custom and ColourNameToRGB(custom) ~= -1 then -- user-assigned single colour for the whole name styles = {{text = v.name, textcolour = ColourNameToRGB(custom)}} adjustedX = 1 + nameStart end
drawText("", 1 + index, adjustedX, styles)
local lineEndX = textWidth(v.line:sub(v.startind + 1, v.endind - 1)) + textWidth(string.rep(" ", 8))
-- Blank out anything left on the sides WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, lineEndX, (index + 1) * vars.fontHeight + 2, -1, ((index + 1) * vars.fontHeight) + vars.fontHeight + 3, ColourNameToRGB("black")) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 1, (index + 1) * vars.fontHeight + 2, textWidth(string.rep(" ", 8)), ((index + 1) * vars.fontHeight) + vars.fontHeight + 3, ColourNameToRGB("black"))
-- Append item amount styles = {}
local spacing = #tostring(v.amount)
table.insert(styles, {text = "[" .. string.rep(" ", spacing == 1 and 2 or spacing == 2 and 1 or spacing == 3 and 1), textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("white")}) table.insert(styles, {text = tostring(v.amount), textcolour = v.amount <= vars.potlow and ColourNameToRGB("red") or ColourNameToRGB("cyan")}) table.insert(styles, {text = string.rep(" ", spacing == 1 and 2 or spacing == 2 and 2 or spacing == 3 and 1) .. "]", textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("white")})
drawText("", 1 + index, 1, styles)
-- Append item level styles = {} table.insert(styles, {text = " (", textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("white")}) table.insert(styles, {text = tostring(v.level), textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("turquoise")}) table.insert(styles, {text = ")", textcolour = ColourNameToRGB("white")})
drawText("", 1 + index, lineEndX, styles)
-- Add hotspot and scrolling to each slot WindowAddHotspot(win, index .. splitter .. v.id .. splitter .. v.name, 2, (index + 1) * vars.fontHeight + 2, -1, ((index + 1) * vars.fontHeight) + vars.fontHeight + 3, "MOUSEOVER", "CANCELMOUSEOVER", "MOUSEDOWN", "CANCELMOUSEDOWN", "MOUSEUP", "ID : " .. v.id .. "\t" .. "Name : " .. v.name .. "\n" .. "Level : " .. v.level .. "\n" .. "Flags : " .. v.flags, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0)
index = index + 1 end -- if v end
-- Redraw window outline to prevent black spots WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_3d_rect, 0, 0, vars.winRight, 0, ColourNameToRGB("teal"), ColourNameToRGB("turquoise")) end
function drawText(text, top, l, styles) -- Utility function, draws text into the miniwin.
local left = l if styles ~= nil then for i, v in ipairs(styles) do left = left + WindowText(win, vars.defaultFont, v.text, left, top * vars.fontHeight - 1, 0, 0, v.textcolour, true) end else WindowText(win, vars.defaultFont, text, left, top * vars.fontHeight - 1, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("white"), true) end end
function toggleMiniwin(flags, hotspot_id) -- Utility function, toggles miniwin sizes.
if flags == miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse then closeToggle() elseif flags == miniwin.hotspot_got_lh_mouse then vars.minimize = not vars.minimize redraw() end end
function setFontSize() -- Sets new font size for miniwin.
local size = utils.inputbox("Enter new font size : ", "{-=Masaki Potion Monitor=-}", tostring(vars.fontSize), vars.defaultFontFamily, vars.fontSize) vars.fontSize = size or vars.fontSize WindowFont(win, vars.defaultFont, vars.defaultFontFamily, vars.fontSize, false, false, false, false, 1, 0) vars.fontHeight = WindowFontInfo(win, vars.defaultFont, 1) calculateWidthHeight() redraw() end
function closeToggle() -- Utility function, displays or hides miniwin.
vars.show = not vars.show showWindow(vars.show) end
function OnPluginClose() WindowDelete(win) end
function OnPluginDisable() showWindow(false) end
function OnPluginEnable() showWindow(true) end
--[[ +----------------------------------------------------------------+ | MISC UTILITIES | +----------------------------------------------------------------+ ]]
function split(s, del) -- Utility function, splits given string by given delimiter.
if del == nil then del = "%s" end local t = {} local i = 1
for str in string.gmatch(s, "([^" .. del .. "]+)") do t[i] = str i = i + 1 end return t end
function centerText(text, width) -- Wraps text into the center of the specified width.
local length = width - #text if length > 0 then text = string.rep(" ", math.floor(length / 2)) .. text .. string.rep(" ", math.floor(length / 2)) end
return #text == width and text or text .. " " end
--[[ ================================================================== = OPERATIONS = ================================================================== ]]
function registerPot(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Check if desired potion exists in inventory and store it's count
if inventory[identifier] and inventory[identifier].name == wildcards.name then -- Increase potion count and update id inventory[identifier].amount = inventory[identifier].amount + 1 inventory[identifier].id = wildcards.id
elseif string.find(string.lower(wildcards.name), string.lower(registeredPot)) then -- Potion found, so store its info identifier = wildcards.name
inventory[identifier] = {} inventory[identifier].amount = 1 inventory[identifier].styles = styles inventory[identifier].id = wildcards.id inventory[identifier].flags = wildcards.flags inventory[identifier].name = wildcards.name inventory[identifier].level = wildcards.level inventory[identifier].line = line
-- Escape any regex within the name local adjustedName = wildcards.name:gsub("([,|.:\\\"'/?%[%]}{_><*+=%(%)%%$#@!~`-])", "%%%1") local startind, endind = string.find(line, adjustedName)
inventory[identifier].startind = startind - 1 inventory[identifier].endind = endind + 1 end end
function finalizeCapture() -- Update\add desired potion into potion list if found
if identifier then vars.potlist[identifier] = inventory[identifier] else ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("Potion not in inventory.", 60)) end
calculateWidthHeight() identifier = nil end
function removePot(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Remove given potion from list
local deleteIndex = -1 for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do if string.find(string.lower(v.name), string.lower(wildcards.pot)) then deleteIndex = i break end end
if deleteIndex ~= -1 then vars.potlist[deleteIndex] = nil
calculateWidthHeight() redraw()
ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("Pot removed.", 60)) else ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText(wildcards.pot .. " not found.", 60)) end end
function clearpots(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Clear potion list
vars.potlist = {} calculateWidthHeight() redraw()
ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("Pot list cleared.", 60)) end
function updatePots(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Update potion amounts
local pot = wildcards.pot if string.find(pot, " on yourself") then pot = string.sub(pot, 1, string.len(pot) - 12) end
for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do if v.name == pot then v.amount = v.amount - 1 break end end
reupAdjust(pot, -1, false)
redraw() end
function batchUpdatePots(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Update potion amounts for varying situations
local pot = wildcards.pot local amount = 1
if string.match(string.sub(pot, 1, 4), "%d+") then s = string.match(string.sub(pot, 1, 4), "%d+") amount = tonumber(s) pot = string.sub(pot, string.len(s) + 4) end
if string.find("sell drop", wildcards.type) then amount = -amount end
for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do if v.name == pot then v.amount = v.amount + amount break end end
reupAdjust(pot, amount, wildcards.type == "buy")
redraw() end
function setlow(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Sets threshold for when potions should be reported as low
vars.potlow = tonumber(wildcards.low) ColourNote(vars.textForeground, vars.textBackground, centerText("New low threshold : " .. tostring(vars.potlow), 60)) end
function calculateWidthHeight() -- Sets the width and height of the miniwin based on pot list
local count = 0 local max_width = 0 for _, k in ipairs(getShownKeys()) do local v = vars.potlist[k] if v then count = count + 1 max_width = math.max(max_width, textWidth("[ ] " .. v.name .. "(" .. tostring(v.level) .. ") ") or 0) end end
vars.winHeight = 1 + count vars.winRight = math.max(max_width, textWidth(vars.header[1].text .. vars.header[2].text .. vars.header[3].text) + 25) end
function refreshPots(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Refresh all potion amounts
for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do if v.name == wildcards.name then v.amount = v.amount + 1 break end end
reupAdjust(wildcards.name, 1, false) end
--[[ ================================================================== = POTION REUP = ================================================================== ]]
function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) -- Track current room number from the Aardwolf GMCP plugin so potreup can -- detect when we've arrived at a shop. if id == "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264" and text == "room.info" then local ok, val = CallPlugin("3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264", "gmcpval", "room.info.num") local n = tonumber(val) if n then currentRoom = n end end end
function fetchRoom() -- On-demand current room lookup (used when GMCP hasn't broadcast recently). local ok, val = CallPlugin("3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264", "gmcpval", "room.info.num") local n = tonumber(val) if n then currentRoom = n end return currentRoom end
function reupMsg(text) cnote("@x099[@WReup@x099]@x045 " .. text .. "@w") end
function reupAdjust(potName, delta, isBuy) -- Update live reup counts (and record the shop room on a buy) for any reup -- pot whose name-match is found inside the given potion name. if not vars.reup then return end if isBuy then fetchRoom() end for _, e in ipairs(vars.reup) do if e.name and e.name ~= "" and string.find(string.lower(potName), string.lower(e.name), 1, true) then e.amount = (tonumber(e.amount) or 0) + delta if e.amount < 0 then e.amount = 0 end if isBuy and currentRoom then e.room = tostring(currentRoom) end end end end
function reupFind(keyword) for i, e in ipairs(vars.reup or {}) do if string.lower(e.keyword) == string.lower(keyword) then return i, e end end return nil end
function potreupAdd(name, line, wildcards) vars.reup = vars.reup or {} local kw = wildcards.keyword local target = tonumber(wildcards.target) or 0 local match = (wildcards.name:gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")) local i, e = reupFind(kw) if e then e.target = target e.name = match reupMsg("Updated reup '@W" .. kw .. "@x045' -> top to @W" .. target .. "@x045 (match: @W" .. match .. "@x045)") else local amt = 0 for _, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do if v.name and string.find(string.lower(v.name), string.lower(match), 1, true) then amt = v.amount or 0 break end end table.insert(vars.reup, {keyword = kw, target = target, name = match, room = "", amount = amt}) reupMsg("Added reup '@W" .. kw .. "@x045' -> top to @W" .. target .. "@x045 (match: @W" .. match .. "@x045)") end end
function potreupTarget(name, line, wildcards) local i, e = reupFind(wildcards.keyword) if e then e.target = tonumber(wildcards.target) or e.target reupMsg("'@W" .. e.keyword .. "@x045' target set to @W" .. e.target) else reupMsg("No reup pot with keyword '@W" .. wildcards.keyword .. "@x045'") end end
function potreupSetRoom(name, line, wildcards) local i, e = reupFind(wildcards.keyword) if not e then reupMsg("No reup pot with keyword '@W" .. wildcards.keyword .. "@x045'") return end local r = fetchRoom() if r then e.room = tostring(r) reupMsg("'@W" .. e.keyword .. "@x045' shop room set to @W" .. e.room) else reupMsg("Couldn't read current room from GMCP.") end end
function potreupRemove(name, line, wildcards) local i, e = reupFind(wildcards.keyword) if i then table.remove(vars.reup, i) reupMsg("Removed reup '@W" .. wildcards.keyword .. "@x045'") else reupMsg("No reup pot with keyword '@W" .. wildcards.keyword .. "@x045'") end end
function reupRefreshAndWait() -- Re-scan the bag and recount everything, then wait for it to finish, so reup -- counts reflect what is actually in your bag instead of a drifting live tally. reupQuiet = true reupScanDone = false for i, v in pairs(vars.potlist) do v.amount = 0 end for i, v in pairs(vars.reup or {}) do v.amount = 0 end refresh = true EnableTrigger("startcaptureinv", true) SendNoEcho("invdata " .. (vars.potbag or "") .. " ansi") -- resume the instant the scan finishes (endcaptureinv sets reupScanDone), -- instead of waiting on a trigger that competes with endcaptureinv. for i = 1, 50 do wait.time(0.1) if reupScanDone then break end end if refresh then -- end marker was missed; clean up so capture triggers aren't left on refresh = false EnableTrigger("refreshinv", false) EnableTrigger("startcaptureinv", false) EnableTrigger("endcaptureinv", false) end reupQuiet = false redraw() end
function potreupList() if not vars.reup or #vars.reup == 0 then reupMsg("No reup pots set. Add with: @Wpotreup add <keyword> <target> <name>@x045") return end wait.make(function() reupRefreshAndWait() -- fresh bag count so the list reflects what you really have cnote("@x099+--------------------- @WPotion Reup @x099---------------------+@w") for _, e in ipairs(vars.reup) do local have = tonumber(e.amount) or 0 local need = (tonumber(e.target) or 0) - have if need < 0 then need = 0 end cnote(string.format( " @W%-10s @x045have @W%3d @x045/ @W%-3d @x045need @W%-3d @x045room @W%-6s @x099(match: %s)@w", tostring(e.keyword), have, tonumber(e.target) or 0, need, (e.room ~= "" and e.room or "?"), tostring(e.name))) end cnote("@x099+-------------------------------------------------------+@w") end) end
function potreupRun() if reupRunning then reupMsg("potreup is already running.") return end vars.reup = vars.reup or {} if #vars.reup == 0 then reupMsg("No reup pots set. Add with: @Wpotreup add <keyword> <target> <name>@x045") return end
reupRunning = true wait.make(function() -- Pull a fresh, real bag count first so deficits are accurate (not a drifting tally). reupMsg("Checking your bag...") reupRefreshAndWait() fetchRoom()
-- group pots that still need topping off, by room (first-seen room order) local order, seen = {}, {} for _, e in ipairs(vars.reup) do local deficit = (tonumber(e.target) or 0) - (tonumber(e.amount) or 0) if e.room and e.room ~= "" and deficit > 0 then if not seen[e.room] then seen[e.room] = {room = e.room, pots = {}}; table.insert(order, seen[e.room]) end table.insert(seen[e.room].pots, e) end end
if #order == 0 then reupMsg("Nothing to reup (all topped off, or no shop rooms recorded).") reupRunning = false return end
for _, grp in ipairs(order) do reupMsg("Traveling to room @W" .. grp.room .. "@x045 ...") Execute("mapper goto " .. grp.room)
local arrived = false for i = 1, 60 do -- poll up to ~30 seconds wait.time(0.5) fetchRoom() if tostring(currentRoom) == tostring(grp.room) then arrived = true break end end
if not arrived then reupMsg("Couldn't reach room @W" .. grp.room .. "@x045 in time - skipping it.") else wait.time(0.5) for _, e in ipairs(grp.pots) do local deficit = (tonumber(e.target) or 0) - (tonumber(e.amount) or 0) if deficit > 0 then reupMsg("have @W" .. (tonumber(e.amount) or 0) .. "@x045/@W" .. e.target .. "@x045 @W" .. e.keyword .. "@x045 - buying @W" .. deficit) Send("buy " .. deficit .. " " .. e.keyword) wait.time(0.7) end end end end reupMsg("@x099*** potreup complete ***") reupRunning = false end) end
--[[ ================================================================== = MINIWIN SNAP CLASS = ================================================================== ]]
rect = {}
rect.intersects = function(r1, r2) local rw, rh, tw, th = rect.width(r2) + r2.x1, rect.height(r2) + r2.y1, rect.width(r1) + r1.x1, rect.height(r1) + r1.y1 return ((rw < r2.x1 or rw > r1.x1) and (rh < r2.y1 or rh > r1.y1) and (tw < r1.x1 or tw > r2.x1) and (th < r1.y1 or th > r2.y1)) end
rect.width = function(r1) return math.abs(r1.x2 - r1.x1) end
rect.height = function(r1) return math.abs(r1.y2 - r1.y1) end
rect.snappable = function(r1, r2, saveVar) -- The idea here is to create inner and outer shells of the second rect, -- then check if the first rect intersects with the outer shell but not -- with the inner shell. If this is true, then the first rect can snap -- to the second rect.
local outerr2 = {x1 = r2.x1 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y1 = r2.y1 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10), x2 = r2.x2 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y2 = r2.y2 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10)} local innerr2 = {x1 = r2.x1 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y1 = r2.y1 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10), x2 = r2.x2 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y2 = r2.y2 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10)} return rect.intersects(r1, outerr2) and not rect.intersects(r1, innerr2) end
rect.snapEdge = function(r1, r2, saveVar) -- What happens here is the second rect gets separated -- into four pieces, one for each side. We then check -- which piece intersects with the first rect, and -- the piece that intersects will then be the snap edge. local top = {x1 = r2.x1, y1 = r2.y1 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10), x2 = r2.x2, y2 = r2.y1 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10)} local bottom = {x1 = r2.x1, y1 = r2.y2 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10), x2 = r2.x2, y2 = r2.y2 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10)} local left = {x1 = r2.x1 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y1 = r2.y1, x2 = r2.x1 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y2 = r2.y2} local right = {x1 = r2.x2 - (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y1 = r2.y1, x2 = r2.x2 + (saveVar.snapSize or 10), y2 = r2.y2} return rect.intersects(r1, top) and r1.y2 <= r2.y1, rect.intersects(r1, bottom) and r1.y1 >= r2.y2, rect.intersects(r1, left) and r1.x2 <= r2.x1, rect.intersects(r1, right) and r1.x1 >= r2.x2 end
function snap(currentWindow, changedX, changedY, saveVar) -- Attempt to snap miniwin to other miniwins -- currentWindow is the dragged window ID -- changedX and changedY is the difference the previous window position and the current window position -- eg: local previousX, previousY = vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y -- vars.pos_x, vars.pos_y = WindowInfo(win, 17) - dragSpotX, WindowInfo(win, 18) - dragSpotY -- local changedX, changedY = vars.pos_x - previousX, vars.pos_y - previousY -- saveVar is where the new x and y positions are saved, usually vars, but can be elsewhere
local currentRect = {x1 = WindowInfo(currentWindow, 10) + changedX, y1 = WindowInfo(currentWindow, 11) + changedY, x2 = WindowInfo(currentWindow, 12) + changedX, y2 = WindowInfo(currentWindow, 13) + changedY} local windows = WindowList() for i, v in ipairs(windows) do -- If miniwin is visible and we aren't checking the current miniwin if WindowInfo(v, 5) and v ~= currentWindow then local winRect = {x1 = WindowInfo(v, 10), y1 = WindowInfo(v, 11), x2 = WindowInfo(v, 12), y2 = WindowInfo(v, 13)} if rect.snappable(currentRect, winRect, saveVar) then local top, bottom, left, right = rect.snapEdge(currentRect, winRect, saveVar)
if top then saveVar.pos_y = winRect.y1 - rect.height(currentRect) elseif bottom then saveVar.pos_y = winRect.y2 elseif left then saveVar.pos_x = winRect.x1 - rect.width(currentRect) elseif right then saveVar.pos_x = winRect.x2 end end end end end
